title: Indian Tailwinds To Intensify
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
India's October industrial production data was released recently and showed year-on-year growth of 11.7%. Excluding any years affected by a direct comparison with a covid-year (2022 was not a major covid-year for India) this marks the largest growth seen in India since March 2013. Overall, we continue to stress that India's economy is doing extremely well.
